prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Lambda II 3.8L GDI V6 (G6DJ)** with forged internals (Manley H-beam connecting rods, JE 9.5:1 forged pistons) and a **Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger** running 18 psi on E85 fuel, paired with a **PRL Motorsports Stage 3 intake manifold** and **Injector Dynamics ID1050x** fuel injectors. ECU reflash via **Syvecs S8 Plug & Play** with custom anti-lag and launch control maps.

Full **KW Suspension Clubsport 3-way coilovers** with adjustable camber plates and **SuperPro poly bushings** (front/rear control arms, subframe, and differential mounts). **Brembo GT 380mm 6-piston front calipers** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads**, paired with **AP Racing CP8390 rear calipers** and **355mm rotors**.

Drivetrain upgrades including a **PPG 6-speed manual transmission swap** (from the Genesis Coupe 3.8L) with a **Spec Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch**, **OS Giken Super Lock LSD**, and **PRL Motorsports short-throw shifter**. **South Bend Clutch dual-mass flywheel** and **Cusco Type RS 2-way LSD** for the rear differential.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works Grandeur-specific widebody kit** (front/rear fenders, side skirts, and rear diffuser) with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** and **Rocket Bunny-style extended rocker panels**. **Seibon Carbon fiber hood** with **custom dual vent scoops** and **Aeromotions active rear wing** (adjustable via hydraulic actuators).

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2** 19x10.5 +30 front and 19x12 +40 rear wheels with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (275/30/19 front, 315/30/19 rear). **Custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** with **gloss black accents** and **VMR carbon fiber mirror caps**.

**Interior stripped and rebuilt** with **Recaro Pole Position seats** (custom upholstered in Alcantara and green stitching), **Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel**, **Defi BF Advance gauges** (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR), and **custom roll cage** (half-cage with bolt-in rear X-brace) by **Custom Cages UK**.
